title: lathyrus lineatus
intro: Lathyrus lineatus, also known as the narrow-leaved pea or lineate pea, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Consuming the plant has been linked to various health benefits, such as reduced risk of cardiovascular disease and improved cognitive function due to its high content of essential nutrients and bioactive compounds. Lathyrus lineatus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is also used as a food source in some regions.
